race.comment: Competitive. HAIIRO (1) positions forward and first-up proved too strong getting home by 1.3 lengths over 1600m at Kilmore. He'd come off an easy Maiden win over 2000m at Warrnambool and is building a tidy record. Steps up quickly to the middle distance but should be fit enough to manage. WHAT A CROSS (4) didn't have the best of it at Pakenham before finding one better here over this distance. May sit closer today and is ready to win. MY UNCLE DID IT (9) raced a $2.9 favourite in the same contest and was run over late. The Wilde yard strikes at 21% at this track and the consistent mare certainly deserves another chance. DIRTY ROBBER (6) brings a 4.5L Maiden win from Horsham over 2100m when stepping up from a mile. Peaks and can't be ruled out.
